sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْأَطْفَالُ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca provode mnogo vremena ispred digitalnih ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Children spend a long time in front of digital screens.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ قَدْ تُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ وَالنَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika može utjecati na zdravlje očiju i spavanje.
sentences.translationEn: This habit may affect eye health and sleep.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ تَحْدِيدُ سَاعَاتِ الِاسْتِخْدَامِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى النَّشَاطِ الْبَدَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Bolje je ograničiti sate korištenja radi očuvanja fizičke aktivnosti.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to limit usage hours to maintain physical activity.
